titleStmt.title: SII 39.66: original edition by K. Karuppiah

No. 66. (A.R. No. 66 of 1916.) TIRUKKĀḶAKKUḌI, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMNAD DISTRICT. KAKŌḶANĀTH TEMPLE-ON THE SAME WALL (INSIDE). JAṬĀVARMAN ALIAS TRIBHUVAṈACHAKRAVARTIN SUNDRA-PĀṆḌYADĒVA-1(9)th YEAR, 13TH CENTURY A.D. (1287 A.D.?).

summary.p: This inscription registers the lease of land by the temple authorities to Uyyavandāṉ Pāṇḍyaṉ alias Sundarapāṇḍya-Narasingadēva a Kaikkōla of Si[ru]-Veṇkuṉṟam near Māḍakkuḷakkīḻ in Madurai, and fixes the rate of Mēlvāram to be paid by the donee to the temple. One of the signatories is Ellāndaliyāṉa-Pāṇḍya-Piramādirāyaṉ. Mēlvāram tax was imposed and collected viz 1/3 from irrigated land (Pāsāṉam), 1/5 from the items like gingly, bananas, sugarcane, lemon coconuts etc and kamugu on new excavated land for the first time 1/9 then 1/8 then 1/7 then latter on 1/3 permanently.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī maṟkittikku mel śrī koccaṭaipaṉmarāṉa tribhuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī cuntarapāṇṭiya tevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 9 vatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu
pūrvvapakṣattu pañcamiyum putaṉ kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Attattu nāḷ miḻalai nāṭṭu tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyār tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiyaṉ
nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī ruttira śrī māheśvarar tevarkaṉmikaḷ koyil kaṇakkar Ivvaṉaivomum māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturai cūḻnta ciṟu
veṇkuṉṟattuk kaikkoḷaril Uyyavantāṉ pāṇṭiyanāṉa cuntarapāṇṭiya naraciṅka tevaṟku kāṇippiṭipāṭu paṇṇik kuṭutta pari
cāvatu yiṉṉāyaṉār tirunāmattukkāṇip paṟṟil Uḷḷūṟa kuṭikkāṭṭuppuravil Ōmandā vayal pantaṉ vayal taṭṭāṉ vayal Āka Ivvayal muṉṟum
muṉṉāḷ 3 vatule Ivarkaḷ tamaiyaṉār pākamum nalem perumāḷ naraciṅkatevaṟku Uḻavu kāṇiyākak kuṭuttu Ivar pakkal tavaṇai mutalāka
ppaṟṟi muṉṉāḷile palapaṟṟi niṉṟa vayirākiyaṉ tanta tavaṇai mutalukku kuṭuppitta Irāci ø100 6 10m cāttuppaṭi cilavukku kuṭuppitta Irāciø9 10m
Āka Irāci ø2 100 5 10 Ippaṇam Iru nūṟṟaimpatukkum Uḻavukāṇiyākap paṟṟi Aṉupavittup ponta yitu Iccuntarapāṇṭiya naraciṅka tevaṟ
ku Ivar kuṭuttu Ivar Aṉupavittu potukiṟa Ikkuṭikkāṭu Oṉṟukkum peru nāṉkellaiyāvatu
kkum vaṭapāṟ pāḻica ce kku teṟkum tikaḷum paṟṟivatiyamakiṭakkiṟa kuḷaṅkaḷum kāṭumentu kiṭakkiṟa viḷainilaṅkaḷum veṭṭit tiruttik koṇṭu can
rātittavaṟ kāṇiyākap paṟṟi Aṉupovippārākavum Ippaṭi Aṉupavikkumiṭattu Ippaṇam Irunūṟṟaimpatukkum Ikkuṭi
kkāṭu muṉṟum kāṇiyākap paṟṟi Aṉupavippārāka piṭipāṭupaṇṇik kuṭuttom
cuntarapāṇṭiya naraciṅka tevaṟku muṉ collappaṭṭa Aṉai
vomum Ippaṭi Aṉupavikkumiṭattu cipaṇṭārattukku melvāram kaṇkāṇittuk koḷḷumiṭattu kaḷanilamiṭṭu paṇimāṟi mutalān mutalil
kaṇkāṇiyākat taṭikkuṟuṇi potuvilk kaḷittu pacāṉam melvāram muṉṟiloṉṟum tiṉai varaku Eḷḷup payaṟu kuṟuvai kaṟumpu koḻuntu karuṇai
mañcaḷ Iñci ceṅkaḻunīr vāḻai vaḻutalai pūcaṇi Uṭpaṭap payir ceyalukkum māppilā nāttai Elumiccai kuḷaviruḷi nelli Iluppai Uṭpaṭa
marattukku Añciloṉṟum teṅku kamukukku Ēḻiloṉṟum puñcaippayaṟu talaipāttu Ēḻiloṉṟum kāṭuveṭṭit tirutti Innilattukku mutalā
ṇṭaikkup pattiloṉṟum Itaṉ yiṟṟaiyāṇṭaikku Oṉpatiloṉṟum Itaṉ yiṟṟaiyāṇṭu Eṭṭiloṉṟum Itaṉ yiṟṟai yāṇṭu Ēḻiloṉ
ṟuṅ koṇṭu Āka Iṉṉālāṇṭuṅ kaḻittāl nilaiyaṭai melvāram muṉṟiloṉṟum Āka Ivvakuppiṉpaṭi koḷḷak kaṭavomākavum
kku Iṉṉāṉ mutal cantirātittavaṟ paṟṟi Aṉupaviṟpārākavum Ippiṭipāṭṭukku Olaik kuṟṟam Eḻuttuk kuṟṟam Eṉṟu collakkaṭavatallavā
kavum Ippaṭikku kalilum cempilum veṭṭik koṇṭu Aṉupavippārāka Ippaṭi cammatittu pa piṭipāṭup paṇṇik kuṭuttom yuyavuntā
naraciṅka tevamaka Uṭaiyā tirukkoḷakkuṭi Uṭaiya nāyaṉār tirukkoyil śrī ruttara
kkar Immāṉaivomum Ippaṭikku
Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cokkappaṭṭar ppiccaṉaiyumiṭṭu tiruciṟṟampala Ācariyaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku
Āḷuṭaiyār Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku cantiracekarappaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ālāl cuntarapaṭṭaṉ cantira
kāppaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku mahādevabhaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku yaṉuppaṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu tirunilamaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku periya
paṭṭaṉ Eḻuttu Ikkoyil paṇṭāpattiyam Uyyaṟeḷikāṭṭiṉāṉ Eḻuttu ceyvittāṉ Eḻuttu cimāveccurak kaṇakku
kaivelaḻakiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ikkāṇi piṭipāṭu pāṅkaluruṭaiyāṉ tiru ñāṉacampanta
Digital edition of SII 39.66 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
